hero.title: Clinical Hydrotherapy: Rehabilitation and Recovery
hero.intro: Helping Your Dog Heal and Thrive

sections.title: Helping Your Dog Heal and Thrive
paragraphs: At K9 Leisure Club, we understand that sometimes our furry friends need a little extra help to recover from injury or manage chronic conditions.
Our clinical hydrotherapy services are designed to provide targeted rehabilitation and support for dogs facing a variety of health challenges.
Note: Owners are required to be present for all hydrotherapy sessions.

sections.title: Conditions We Can Help With
bullets: Arthritis management to reduce pain and improve mobility.
Neurological conditions support for balance and strength.
Obesity management for safe weight loss and fitness.
Muscle injuries and strains support to promote healing.

sections.title: Our Clinical Hydrotherapy Approach
paragraphs: Our certified hydrotherapist will work with you and your veterinarian to develop a customised treatment plan for your dog.
bullets: Underwater treadmill therapy to improve gait, strength, and endurance.
Therapeutic exercises to target muscle groups and improve range of motion.
Manual therapy including massage and stretching to relieve tension.
